content: Common mistakes extracting a component from a monolith into a standalone library: shipping only the top-level component while its full dependency chain (child components, styles, logic) stays coupled; hidden tight interdependencies where data/schema stays locked to the original app even after UI is 'decoupled'; inconsistent naming/structure carried over from the monolith; no namespace isolation causing collisions in consumers; migrating project-specific patterns into the shared library without a reusability bar, polluting the library.
